title: Immersive Bonsai
description: Immersive Bonsai Allows For Tree Automation Inside Garden Cloches From Immersive Engineering Through The Creation Of Bonsais
body:
Do you want to grow trees in your Immersive Engineering Garden Cloches? Garden Cloches are designed for small plants and crops, but that will not stop us!

Using a pair of shears, you can turn any vanilla sapling into a bonsai in your crafting grid, ready for use in the Garden Cloche. Each bonsai generates 4 logs of its wood type every 2.5 minutes. Some bonsais, like Oak, also have a chance to produce extra items, such as apples.

With Farmer’s Delight installed, you can use the provided rich soil to halve the growth time.

You can even prank your non-engineer friends by replacing the saplings in their big, redundant tree farms with sterile bonsais!
